description:
Boost hotfix bundle 19

This is the brealorg Morphe patch source for Boost for Reddit hotfixes.

APKMirror provides the clean Boost APK.
This bundle provides the patches used by Morphe.

Use a clean Boost 1.12.12 APK as input.

Included Boost-specific fixes:
- Fix missing audio in v.redd.it video downloads/shares
- Improve Giphy loading with direct media.giphy.com MP4 fallback
- Restore inline Giphy previews in comments
- Add inline previews for direct GIF links
- Improve inline preview layout handling
- Improve completed download notifications

Notes:
- This is not the upstream Patcheddit v1.4.0 source.
- If duplicate/confusing patches appear, temporarily disable the original Patcheddit source.
- For debugging, enable only Spoof client plus the patch being tested.
